{"step_by_step_thinking": "A simple bar chart is used to compare discrete categories, a pie diagram is used to show proportions of a whole, and a multiple bar chart is used to compare two or more categories across different groups. A histogram, on the other hand, is used to represent the distribution of a continuous variable by dividing the range of values into bins and counting the number of observations that fall into each bin.", "answer_choice": "B"}
